Take a slow breath in.
Hold it. Let it go. You're safe.
Your thoughts are racing,
but you don't have to chase them.
This feeling will pass.
It always does.
You are safe in this moment,
right here, right now.
One thing at a time.
You don't have to solve it all today.
Breathe in for four,
hold for four, out for four.
Your mind is loud right now,
but you are still in control.
Not everything needs an answer tonight.
Let it rest for now.
You've gotten through every anxious moment before.
This one is no different.
Ground yourself: five things you can see,
four things you can touch.
Worry is not a plan.
You can set it down for a moment.
Your body is safe,
even if your mind feels unsettled.
It's okay to not have it figured out.
Uncertainty is not danger.
Let your shoulders drop.
Let your jaw unclench. You're okay.
This spiral has an end.
I'll stay until you find it.
You don't have to fix everything right now.
Just breathe with me.
Anxiety lies about how bad things are.
You are more capable than it says.
Slow down, love.
There's no race to finish today.
You are not your thoughts.
You are the one noticing them.
I'm right here.
Let's breathe through this together.
